title: Define Wave 34 manager provider profile scorecard contract
description: Extend architecture docs with additive assignment-aware provider profile scorecard fields, optional queue-context behavior, and the UX state map for selection from provider profile.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture docs define additive assignment_fit payload for queue-aware provider profile requests
UI/UX map documents recommended, warning, unavailable, unauthorized, and session-expired profile states
Module map clarifies backend/mobile ownership for queue-aware provider scorecard consumption
